findings.evidence: Current signature at lines 32-35 ends with `(P : Ideal A) [P.IsMaximal] :`; the PR diff shows the removed `(hP : P ≠ ⊥)`, and `rg -n "deprecated" code/TauCeti/NumberTheory/DedekindDomain/RamificationInertia.lean` finds no deprecation wrapper.
findings.fix: Keep the old theorem signature and ignore `hP` in the proof, or move the hP-free statement to a new name and leave a dated `@[deprecated]` alias/wrapper for the old API where possible.
findings.issue: Public theorem `TauCeti.DedekindDomain.ncard_primesOver_eq_natCard_iff_of_isGaloisGroup` dropped the explicit `(hP : P ≠ ⊥)` argument, changing its callable API without a compatibility path.

summary: The PR silently changes the arity of a public TauCeti theorem while adapting to the Mathlib bump. Existing downstream positional uses with the old nonzero-ideal argument will break.
